narrative:
Cincinnati 1-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 355 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.6%, a clear Republican lean of 7.3 percentage points.
